author: Martino Wong
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Shows stats (wordcount, reading time) beside headings and in the status bar

manifest.author: Martino Wong
manifest.description: Shows configurable section stats beside each heading and the note title in the editor.
manifest.name: Section Meter

name: Section Meter

releases.author: martinowong
releases.description:
Fixes the whole-note title badge on mobile and in narrow windows.

The title badge now stays visible near the note title and wraps cleanly on smaller screens.

releases.author: martinowong
releases.description: Fix Obsidian review recommendations by removing the builtin-modules dependency and adding a release workflow that rebuilds, uploads, and attests plugin assets.

releases.author: martinowong
releases.description:
## 0.10.2

- Replaced floating selection stats with a bottom status-bar readout.
- Added whole-note stats to the status bar.
- Added separate status-bar display toggles for whole-note stats, selected-text stats, words, timing, and characters.
- Refined readable character counting around paragraph boundaries.
- Kept heading badges to one section badge per visible heading.
